nameMeanings.name: Lyttleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Littleton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, mostly in southwestern England, named in Old English as ‘small settlement’, from lȳtel ‘small’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Elyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Elyn Lyttleton was born about 1485, in Quenington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 daughter with Robert Harpur.
